title: Constraint-Based Manuscript
abstract: Primary anchor manuscript detailing the constraint model.

title: Framework Primer
abstract: Working framework notes that map the core alignment concepts.

title: Quiet Systems Essay
abstract: Short essay on quiet system design and constraint-aware research.

abstract: Essay scaffold on how inward states are converted into visible signals for approval, safety, status, and belonging.

title: Core Axioms
abstract: Compressed starting assumptions underlying the Alignment Theory framework.

title: Core Laws
abstract: Law-like structural statements describing recurring dynamics across persons, systems, and culture.

abstract: Scriptural anchor translations linking biblical language to the framework's structural distinctions.

title: Metaphysical Claims
abstract: Largest claims of the framework concerning reality, truth, evil, meaning, salvation, and Christ.

title: Capacity Check-In
abstract: Instrument concept for assessing capacity and constraint readiness.

title: Case Notes: Alignment Drift
abstract: Observational notes documenting drift patterns and recovery signals.
